strategic_objective: Explore mechanisms behind coexistence of near-constant and strongly class-variable features and implications for model reliance balancing.
key_checks: Characterize feature subsets by diversity and class-conditioned variation
Investigate data processing or measurement steps that could produce low diversity features
Assess how stable and variable features contribute to class discrimination
Evaluate potential trade-offs in model reliance on stable vs variable features
success_criteria: Identification of plausible data or processing origins for contrasting feature behaviors
Evidence-based guidance on balancing feature reliance in modeling
Improved interpretability of dataset structure considering feature tension
router_constraints: preserve evidence refs e9 to e12 and e23 to e25
